# propose-folder-structure
Description: Proposes different hierarchical folder structures for new content within a repository based on user requirements.
Source: project
1. Identify the target repository and the general purpose of the new content.
2. Analyze existing organizational patterns and conventions within the repository.
3. Generate and present multiple hierarchical structure options, illustrating potential file placements.
4. Solicit user feedback to select or refine the preferred structure.
